articles.title: MI's de Kock and Bawa ruled out of remainder of IPL 2026 due to injury
articles.description: While de Kock sustained a tendon injury in his left wrist, Bawa suffered a ligament tear in his right thumb

articles.title: Masood, Babar fall as Bangladesh take big strides towards series win
articles.description: At tea on day four, Bangladesh are five wickets away from a 2-0 series sweep of Pakistan

articles.title: Former Australia and Queensland wicketkeeper John Maclean dies aged 80
articles.description: John Maclean played four Tests and two ODIs for Australia in 1978-79

articles.title: MJK Smith, former England and Warwickshire captain, dies aged 92
articles.description: Batter led England in 25 of his 50 Tests, and also claimed an England cap as a fly-half in rugby union

articles.title: Mushfiqur ton, Litton and Joy fifties set Pakistan 437
articles.description: Shahzad picked up four wickets but Mushfiqur ensured Bangladesh remained well in front

articles.title: Lanka Premier League returns after two years, opener set for July 17
articles.description: Sri Lanka's T20 franchise competition returns for the first time since its 2024 edition, with the player draft scheduled for June 1

articles.title: BCB elections to elect new president to be held on June 7
articles.description: Former Bangladesh captain Tamim Iqbal is the current BCB president

articles.title: Pakistan name Iram Javed in T20 World Cup squad
articles.description: They will first travel to Ireland, where they play a tri-series that also includes West Indies

articles.title: ICC suspends funding to Cricket Canada over governance-related issues
articles.description: ESPNcricinfo understands the funding suspension will not impact any cricket activities, including high performance programmes

articles.title: Fatima Sana smashes fastest fifty in women's T20Is
articles.description: Her 15-ball effort broke the record previous held by Sophie Devine, Phoebe Litchfield and Richa Ghosh, off 18 balls

articles.title: MS Dhoni set to play one game for CSK at Chepauk in 2027 before retiring
articles.description: Dhoni has not travelled with CSK for their last league-stage match of the season against Gujarat Titans, set to be played on May 21.
